title: Trump's UFC plan sparks sharp debate
shortDescription: White House Reporter Zac Anderson explains Trump's UFC White House idea and why it reflects a divisive political moment in America.

title: Trump files appeal to keep name on Kennedy Center as deadline looms
shortDescription: The president's move to appeal comes after a judge ruled that Trump's name had been added to the iconic DC building illegally and must be removed.

title: Ohio voter ID amendment heads to 2026 ballot
shortDescription: Ohio lawmakers sent a voter ID amendment to the November 2026 ballot and advanced a plan to require photo ID for mail‑in voting starting in 2027.

title: Trump says 'great settlement' reached with Iran
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said a "great settlement" has been reached with Iran after cancelling planned strikes.

title: Republicans beat Democrats at Congressional Baseball Game
shortDescription: Republicans beat Democrats 11-2 in the Congressional Baseball Game, extending their streak as the charity event raised $3.2 million.

title: What to know about Jay Clayton, Trump's pick to lead US intel agencies
shortDescription: Clayton heads DOJ's Manhattan office and is a former SEC chair. His nomination comes after blowback to Trump's acting director choice Bill Pulte

title: I visited Trump's arch site. Here's the latest on the project
shortDescription: The Trump administration wants the "Triumphal Arch" built in two to three years. Here's how they plan to do that.

title: Democrats lead Republicans in latest congressional ballot poll
shortDescription: With the midterms looming, Democrats continue to hold a double-digit lead over GOP congressional candidates in Emerson College's latest poll.

title: Trump restores commercial fishing to 500,000 square miles of Pacific
shortDescription: President Trump is signing a proclamation to restore commercial fishing within three marine monuments in the Pacific Ocean.

title: Trump taps U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as DNI nominee amid backlash to Pulte
shortDescription: Clayton is a former chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission who oversees the Justice Department office in the Southern District of New York.

title: Runoff tight for Georgia governor, Senate. What will seal the deal?
shortDescription: The runoff race for a U.S. Senate seat in Georgia is tight going into the final day of early voting. Trump will hold second telerally for Jones.

title: Trump news, schedule and updates on June 11 from Trump Connect
shortDescription: President Trump explains his 'I love the inflation' comment. He vowed to strike Iran 'very hard' tonight. It's the Trump news rundown for June 11.

title: Why critics say Trump’s intel chief pick threatens national security
shortDescription: House Intelligence Committee Democrats called on Trump to rescind Bill Pulte's appointment, 'due to his complete lack of national security' experience

title: Trump's Great American State Fair faces another possible setback
shortDescription: Freedom 250's Great American State Fair hit snags in recent weeks as its 16-day concert series unraveled. Now, some states won't be participating.

title: House blocks spying law that shapes Trump's daily security briefing
shortDescription: The House of Representatives failed to renew FISA Section 702, a surveillance law that allows U.S. spy agencies to collect foreigners' communications.

title: Marjorie Taylor Greene says Trump wants to 'cover up for pedophiles'
shortDescription: Former congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene called those who have failed to release the Epstein files "traitors," and "covering up for pedophiles."

title: 'I love the inflation' comment out of context, Trump and Johnson argue
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said on June 10 'I love the inflation' when asked about the May CPI report. He later told the New York Post it was out of context.

title: Trump cancels strikes on Iran, says agreement is being finalized
shortDescription: President Trump said he has canceled Thursday airstrikes he previously threatened on Iran, citing progress toward a peace deal.

title: Congress plays ball for charity
shortDescription: The annual game, which kicked off in 1901, features Republican congressional members vs. Democratic congressional members and raises money for charity.

title: Trump asks for world peace in birthday wish
shortDescription: President Donald Trump revealed his wish ahead of his 80th birthday is "peace for the world" while also saying he will continue attacking Iran "hard."
